actions.value:
Our Wyre sell option has been having issues. We would suggest contacting them directly at support@sendwyre.com to help with your sell. If they are not responsive we would suggest giving Moonpay a try. You can access their sell option here: https://www.moonpay.com/buy. After visiting the site click on "Sell BTC" and then follow the prompts. 


If you have any questions or concerns please let us know.
